purpose: Block runs that claim conveyor-produced status without a command invocation receipt proving the canonical prompt-to-conveyor entrypoint was used.
passConditions: exact argv matched the declared prompt-to-conveyor command
blockConditions: argv does not match declared canonical command
no run envelope or dispatch proof
claimed conveyor-produced status without invocation proof
completionPosture: Conveyor Entrypoint Required passes only when the canonical prompt-to-conveyor invocation is proven end to end by receipt evidence.
